_comment: Detection-layer eval baseline. `known_gaps` lists case ids whose CURRENT detection output does not match ground truth — the honest, version-controlled 'here is exactly what we currently miss' disclosure. The corpus test asserts the failing set equals this list exactly: a NEW miss fails CI (regression), and a newly-FIXED gap also fails (so the baseline must be updated down, ratcheting recall up). Each gap below is a real enforcement-bypass class for the bash file-read gate; hardening them is follow-up work tracked separately from this corpus.
